name: PROGRESSIVE DIAPHYSEAL DYSPLASIA
definition: ENGELMANN-CAMURATI DISEASE = CAMURATI-ENGELMANN DISEASE autosomal dominant disorder of intramembranous ossification

demographics.Genetics: mutation in gene encoding transforming growth factor TGF-β1 (= latency-associated

dominant_finding: amorphous sclerosis of skull base → cranial nerve palsy
distribution: bilateral symmetric cortical thickening involving periosteal + endosteal surfaces of long
discriminating_features: amorphous sclerosis of skull base → cranial nerve palsy
encroachment of frontal + sphenoid sinus; sparing of maxillary sinus
bilateral symmetric cortical thickening involving periosteal + endosteal surfaces of long

general: amorphous sclerosis of skull base → cranial nerve palsy
encroachment of frontal + sphenoid sinus; sparing of maxillary sinus
Long bones: bilateral symmetric cortical thickening involving periosteal + endosteal surfaces of long
abrupt demarcation of lesions ← sparing of metaphyses + epiphyses ← formed by
cortical thickening (= endosteal + periosteal accretion of mottled new bone) →
progression of lesions along long axis of bone toward either end
